assertions.description: All three KiCad 5 PCB files in kicad_wspr (wspr_tx_v1, wspr_tx_m0_v1, si5351_featherwing_v1) report kicad_version='unknown' despite having file_version=20171130 which is the KiCad 5.x format. The same issue appears in kicad_templates where all 15 KiCad 5 boards show 'unknown'. By contrast, the schematic analyzer correctly reports '5 (legacy)' for the matching .sch files. The PCB analyzer is missing a mapping from file_version=20171130 to 'KiCad 5' or similar.
